# Agent Onboarding & Optimization Sprint Board

## Sprint: Agent Onboarding & Optimization (2026-03-05)

### Goals
- Unified onboarding for Claude & VS Code agents
- Subagent orchestration best practices
- Token cost optimization
- Scientific benchmarking and SLO enforcement
- Durable workflow rules and troubleshooting

---

### Tasks
- [ ] Draft unified agent onboarding guide (AGENT_SETUP.md)
- [ ] Curate best practices for subagent orchestration and token efficiency
- [ ] Document folder and command conventions in markdown and memory atoms
- [ ] Validate config files and add troubleshooting tips
- [ ] Add/curate token optimization markdown (TOKEN_OPTIMIZATION.md)
- [ ] Add/curate best-of-breed onboarding sections
- [ ] Add config validation scripts
- [ ] Design and run agent/benchmark tests
- [ ] Update docs with benchmark numbers

---

### Benchmarks & Tests
- Run `tools/harness/cli.ts` and `agent_sim.ts` with all presets
- Record latency, token usage, agent throughput
- Update AGENT_SETUP.md and TOKEN_OPTIMIZATION.md with results

---

### Status
- Sprint created and in progress (2026-03-05)
- Atoms persisted for durable conventions and sprint status
- Docs and benchmarks will be updated as work completes
